modeled_boundary: The bug class and same-class search boundary modeled for PM triage.
old_model_miss_reason: Explain why previous FlowGuard coverage did not catch this class.

minimal_sufficient_repair_recommendation.why_minimal: Explain why smaller repairs are insufficient and larger repairs are unnecessary.
minimal_sufficient_repair_recommendation.expected_effect: Explain what this repair changes in the modeled behavior.

counterexamples_or_absence: Record counterexamples found or explicitly state none were found within the modeled boundary.
confidence_boundary: State what this model does and does not prove.
